stories.headline: Stocks Waver as SK Hynix Makes US Debut | Open Interest 7/10/2026
stories.summary: Get a jump start on the US trading day with Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Open Interest." SK Hynix makes Wall Street history with the biggest-ever U.S. debut by a foreign company. Delta beats earnings expectations, but shares fluctuate on a cloudy outlook. And earnings season ramps up next week, with Wall Street's biggest banks set to report another blockbuster quarter. Emily Roland of Manulife John Hancock Investments, John Stoltzfus of Oppenheimer
